01_about

Knowledge should compound, not stay siloed.

I've always believed the strongest innovations emerge when people can access, share, and build on each other's work. Open source is the purest expression of that belief.

Working in open-source strategy — OSPOs, governance, compliance, and developer enablement — I've watched openness reduce cost, accelerate R&D, and change how organizations collaborate.

"That belief is the foundation of Open Idea — and the lens I bring to every engagement."

We take on a small number of engagements each quarter — full-stack product builds, AI/ML & LLM integration, cloud migration, and open-source strategy for teams that want to ship something real.

02_featured_product

Open Idea — where ideas become apps.

live · beta · openidea.world

Research × Build × Collaborate

An AI-powered platform that pulls fragmented open-source and open-access knowledge into one workspace — then lets you turn what you find into a working application, end-to-end.

visit openidea.world ↗
openidea.world
★ feature_01

Open Resources Discovery

One search across GitHub, OpenAlex, arXiv, Hugging Face, YouTube, Zenodo, Software Heritage, Wikifactory & OSHWA.

AI Search8+ SourcesMulti-modal
/resources

Knowledge Graph

A live map of how search results connect by topic, author, and source — 2D & 3D views to spot clusters fast.

★ feature_03 — flagship

App Studio

AI-powered code generation with live preview. Start from a prompt, a template, or your profile — LinkedIn → Portfolio, Instagram → E-store, PDF → Animated site. Ship to Vercel, export to GitHub, or download a ZIP.

04_services

What we'll ship for you.

[ service_01 ]

Full-Stack Product Development

Web apps, backend APIs, end-to-end product builds. Go, Python, Java, React. From scrappy MVPs to systems serving millions — track record across JP Morgan, Apple, KENT CamEye & Open Idea.

Web AppsAPIsGoPythonReact
[ service_02 ]

AI/ML & LLM Integration

Plug AI into your product. Groq, OpenAI, Anthropic, or open-weight models. RAG systems, vector DBs, prompt & chain design, evals, guardrails. We've shipped this stack at Open Idea.

LLMsRAGVector DBsOpen Weights
[ service_03 ]

Cloud Migration & SRE

Azure, IBM Cloud, AWS. Production-grade observability with Grafana, Prometheus, OpenSearch. Track record: 25% latency cut at IBM Watson, 15% tooling cost reduction at T-Mobile.

CloudSREObservabilityMLOps
[ service_04 ]

Open-Source Strategy & OSPO

Stand up or scale your OSPO. Governance, contribution workflows, license & compliance, OSS vs CSS evaluations, developer enablement. Done at Société Générale.

OSPOGovernanceComplianceOSS
